Our most sophisticated tool is mutating policies.

This enables advanced techniques like model selection via semantic routing or complexity analysis.

It also enables seamless translation between inference providers, meaning we can fall back from OpenAI to Anthropic if one has an outage without needing to send a whole new request.

Credential injection allows us to protect our API key. Since we can store it in a central location and then enable many different workloads to use it transparently.

We can even configure guardrails to neither drop requests, nor respond to them, but instead to do things like redact sensitive information en route.

And finally, it's possible to integrate with a file service so that you can upload a file once and then reference it via a handle going forward. With the contents hydrated at the gateway.

The possibilities are sort of endless…. Which is a problem in its own way. We'll get to that later.

...
